overview: A professional, enterprise-grade Fake Website Detection platform with real-time URL scanning powered by client-side heuristic analysis. Features a stunning dark cybersecurity theme with animated scanning effects, detailed threat breakdowns, statistics dashboard, and threat feed — all inspired by academic ML research on phishing detection.
features: Real-time URL scanner with animated scanning visualization
Detailed feature breakdown: SSL, domain, keywords, TLD, typosquatting
How It Works section with 4-step ML detection explanation
Capabilities showcase: URL, SSL, domain age, subdomain analysis
Recent threat feed with 8 demo phishing domains
Dark cybersecurity theme: navy, electric blue, green/red threat colors
Animated counters, pulse effects, scanning animations, hover glows
